events.scope: Sagaing’s Pale, Yinmarbin, Kani, Budalin, Ayadaw,  Taze, and Ye-U townships, Mandalay’s Mogyoke and Myingyan townships, and Magway's Taungdwingyi townships
Chin state’s Matupi, Tonzang, Paletwa, Falam, Kanpetlet, Thantlang, Tedim, Mindat townships, Magway's Myaing, Gangaw, and Tilin townships
Sagaing's Pinlebu, Wuntho, Kawlin, Salingyi, Mingin, Kalay townships, Chin's Haka township
Loikaw, Demoso, Bawlakhe, Hpasawng, and Mese townships in Kayah State
Dawei, Launglong, and Thayetchaung townships, Tanintharyi Region
Townships around Mingaladon Air Force Base, Yangon Region
Multiple villages along the Pathein River and up the coast, Gwa township, Rakhine State and Thabaung township, Ayeyarwady Region
Kanpauk area, Yebyu township, Tanintharyi Region
Bawmi village, Shwethaungyan town, Pathein township, Ayeyarwady Region
Chaung Tha, Hainggyi Island, Kyone Pyaw, Labutta, Ngapudaw, Ngayokaung, Ngwe Saung, Pathein, Shwe Thaung Yan, Thabaung, and Yeygi townships, Ayeyarwady Region
Kyeikdon town, Kawkareik township, Kayin State
5 areas across Myawaddy and Kyain Seikgyi townships, Kayin State and Tachileik township, Shan State
Coastal villages in Launglon township, Dawei district, Tanintharyi Region
Htone Makha and Thabaw-Lake villages, Tanintharyi township, Tanintharyi Region
Payanthonzu, Kyain Seikgyi township, Kayin State
Namtaw town, Homalin township, Sagaing Division
Teepinkyo checkpoint, Pyay township, Bago Region
Mwe Myaysun village, Madaya township, Mandalay Region and Sinkai North village, Wetlet township, Sagaing Division
Gangaw, Saw, and Tilin townships, Yaw region, Magway Division
Payanthonzu, Kyain Seikgyi township, Kayin State
Chaung Nyi Ko and Yarmpho villages, Tanintharyi township, Tanintharyi Region
Minthar village tract, Yebyu township, Tanintharyi Region
Mawchi area, Hpasawng township, Kayah State
Hainggyi Island, Hinthada, Kyangin, Kyonpyaw, Lemyethna, Myanaung, Nga Yoke Kaung, Tahbaung, and Yegyi townships, Ayeyarwady Region
Launglon township, Dawei district, Tanintharyi Region
Nyaung-U-Chauk road, Nyaung-U township, Mandalay Region
Mangyipinin village, Taungoo township, Bago Region
Bahan and Sanchaung townships, Yangon Region
Villages in western Seikphyu township, Magway Division
Kawkareik and Myawaddy townships, Kayin State
Anyarphyar village, Dawei district, Tanintharyi Region
Conflict areas along Mon State and Tanintharyi Region border
Lansal village, Hsawlaw township and Lumyang village, Waingmaw township, Kachin State
Mandalay and Pyinoolwin townships, Mandalay Region
Bonto village, Chaung-U township, Sagaing Division
Man San village tract and Namtu town, Namtu township, Shan State
Zardi village, Yebyu township, Tanintharyi Region
Launglon township, Dawei district, Tanintharyi Region
Eastern parts of the Mogok area, Shan State
Mingaladon and North Okkalapa townships, Yangon Region
